commit_scope: Promote live route-pressure read surfaces into the BML front-door route catalog.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/kernel-http.fk form-stdlib/language-model.fk form-stdlib/tests/source-language-route-class-template-band.fk
observations: New native route-selection proof passed for GET /api/runtime/events, /api/views/stats/{asset_id}, /api/reactions/concept/{entity_id}/summary, /api/reactions/concept/{entity_id}/threads, and /api/concepts/{concept_id}/voices.
Form cross-kernel route-class validation returned 1049665 with 1 ok and 0 divergent.
Comparable live web_api pressure readings moved from roughly 0.8435 before the views/reactions/voices lifts to 0.8755 after them; next web route is GET /api/lenses.
API pressure is live-window sensitive and remains led by GET /api/concepts/domain/living-collective; latest written state shows 0.802 with 1604/2000 native events.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof passed; CI, merge, deploy, and public verification remain to be completed for this branch.

evidence_refs: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/kernel-http.fk form-stdlib/language-model.fk form-stdlib/tests/source-language-route-class-template-band.fk

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The kernel front door can serve the promoted read routes natively once deployed, reducing Python fanout on live route-pressure surfaces without changing response contracts.
test_flows: After deploy, request promoted endpoints with Accept: application/json and verify X-Form-Router is native-kernel or native-kernel-go.
Run native_route_goal_loop for web_api and api sources to verify the promoted routes remain high_grammar_native.
